nasb.text: Now Abraham arose early in the morning and went to the place where he had stood before the Lord;

esv.text: And Abraham went early in the morning to the place where he had stood before the Lord.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕清早起來，到他從前站在耶和華面前的地方，

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕清早起来，走到他从前站在耶和华面前的地方，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕清早起来，到了他曾在耶和华面前站立的地方。
